assessment.note: She describes low-novelty cleanup and review work with little that feels new, which is a strong flat-engagement signal.

new_queue.label: Nothing feels new
new_queue.name: What kind of work feels missing right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into her 'not much that feels new' comment to surface whether she is missing stretch, ownership, or variety.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Mentoring thread
new_queue.name: What stopped the mentoring idea from moving forward?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the real blocker on the stalled mentoring thread without assuming it was lack of interest.

new_queue.label: Ownership next quarter
new_queue.name: What do you expect to own next quarter?
new_queue.description: Clarifies her own mental model of upcoming ownership before new work is introduced.

new_queue.label: Scope tradeoff
new_queue.name: What would you want to leave off your plate if that next-quarter shape holds?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete trade-off around capacity and protects against hidden overcommitment.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends the conversation by turning the discussion into concrete support or adjustments.
